_comment: Fleet truck registry — maps truck IDs to Viam machine Part IDs.
Single-Pi architecture: each truck has one Pi 5 running all modules.
Truck 00 is a demo/sim truck that always shows simulated data.
Truck 01 is the first production truck with real hardware.

trucks.name: Demo Truck
trucks._comment: Simulated data only — no hardware required

trucks.name: Truck 01
trucks._comment: Production truck — Part ID filled from env vars at runtime
